attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: ["Achin' and Shakin' | Achin' and Shakin' is the second studio album released by \"Broadway\" actress and Mercury Nashville recording artist Laura Bell Bundy. She signed to Mercury Records Nashville and released her first country music single, \"Giddy On Up,\" on February 20, 2010. The album's second single, \"Drop on By,\" was released to country radio on August 9, 2010.", "Giddy On Up | \"Giddy On Up\" is the debut single by American stage actress and singer Laura Bell Bundy. Bundy wrote this song with Jeff Cohen and Mike Shimshack."]
